universal.label: Tests cover happy path and sad paths (nil, invalid, unauthorized, boundary)
No hardcoded credentials, tokens, or API keys
Linter passes on changed files (commands from stack profile)
Security / dependency scan passes when stack profile defines tooling.security or deps_audit
No commented-out code left in the diff
Types correct where applicable (per stack profile tooling.typecheck)
Authorization verified before data access on protected resources
Business logic not in views/templates/handlers only — service layer used
